ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial data point */,
  "easting" REAL /* East-west coordinate of the data point */,
  "northing" REAL /* North-south coordinate of the data point */,
  "angle" REAL /* Angle of the data point (in degrees) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of geometric shape (e.g., square, circle, polygon) */,
  "width_diameter" REAL /* Width or diameter of the shape */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the shape */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the shape */,
  "distribution" REAL /* Distribution of the shape (e.g., density, frequency) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the data point belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the data point */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last modified the data point */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was last modified */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, satellite imagery) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data point coordinates */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data point (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of geospatial data (e.g., shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "spatial_reference" TEXT /* Spatial reference system (e.g., EPSG:4326) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "data_validation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_datasets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data_relationships" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geospatial data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., contains, overlaps, intersects) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last modified the relationship */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_relationships_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES geospatial_datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_relationships_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_relationships_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* JSON string containing the data sources used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
